2 Indicates the resident's goal to move from a lying to sitting position at the side of the bed by the end of the SNF
PPS Part A stay. -=Not assessed/no information
 01=Dependent
 02=Substantial/maximal assistance
 03=Partial/moderate assistance

 05=Setup or clean-up assistance
 06=Independent
 ^=Blank (skip pattern) effective 10/01/2016
